title: LETAOTAO Cereal Bowl Set of 4, Ceramic Cereal Bowls for Kitchen, 6 Inch Deep Soup Bowls Set, White Bowl Set with Gold Trim, Serving Bowls Set for Salad, Pasta, Oatmeal,Fruits, Decorative Bowls(28oz)
features: 【SIZE SUITABLE FOR DAILY USE】Ceramic cereal bowl set of 4 each bowl measures 6 inches in diameter, 2.6 inches in height. The normal capacity is 22oz and limit capacity is 28 oz Ideal for serving salads, soups, oatmeal, ramen noodles, fruits and other various food items

【Elegant and Practical】White bowl set with elegant gold rim process, not only simple and generous but also very elegant and delicate, vertical stripe design texture design allows you to easily hold the ceramic soup bowls, this is a multi-functional ceramic bowl set that is both decorative and practical

【Ceramic Material】The pasta oatmeal bowls is made of high quality ceramic material by high temperature firing. It is not only safe, sturdy and durable, but also has a smooth surface that is very easy to clean and rinse in daily use, dishwasher safe. NOTE: In order to better protect the golden edge design on the surface, it is not recommended to use the thick bowl in the microwave and oven.

【PERFECT GIFT IDEAS】This beautiful salad bowl set can be the perfect companion for lovers of making all kinds of delicious dishes, also great for daily use, a great gift choice for friends housewarming, weddings, Christmas, Thanksgiving and other holidays.

【Excellent Service】We value every customer's purchasing experience. Each set of porcelain bowls undergoes strict quality inspection before shipment. If you have any questions after receiving our products, please feel free to contact us and we will deal with your problem immediately.
